domain_type.description: Detected problem type (e.g., time_series_regression, tabular_classification, sensor_fusion)

data_characteristics.description: Key data properties (e.g., sequential, multi-sensor, high_frequency, GPS-denied)

techniques.description: Relevant techniques with WHY each is relevant to this domain

unexplored_directions.description: Approaches not yet tried that literature suggests

references.description: Papers, benchmarks, URLs cited (author, year, venue)

reasoning.description: 3-5 sentence summary connecting findings to this project
